title: Request for Customer Relationship Management (CRM) System
description: Coop Bank Tanzania Plc seeks to procure and implement a robust, secure, and scalable Customer Relationship Management (CRM) System to enhance customer engagement, improve service delivery, and support data-driven decision-making. Primary objectives include centralizing customer data for 360-degree relationship view, enhancing customer service, retention, and loyalty, enabling personalized engagement through analytics and segmentation, supporting sales, marketing, and service automation, ensuring regulatory compliance (data protection, KYC), and seamless integration with core banking systems and third-party platforms. Service delivery channels: web portal, social media, online chat, chatbots, SMS, and VoIP-enhanced voice services.
